concerns.text: The plan states that the full pairwise gene‑gene correlation matrix for ~30 k genes (~450 M correlations) will be computed on a GitHub Actions runner with 2 CPU and ~7 GB RAM, and the entire pipeline must finish within ≤ 6 h. Computing and storing 450 M correlation values in memory or even in chunked files is likely to exceed both the CPU time and memory limits of the free compute environment, making the approach infeasible under the stated constraints.
